hero.title: Upgrade your café & restaurant management
hero.subtitle: The easiest way to manage your workflow and collaborate with your team seamlessly.

features.globalTitle: Everything You Need to Run Your Café & Restaurant
features.globalSubtitle: From menus to staff, inventory to customer discovery — manage it all in one sleek platform. Save time, cut costs, and focus on serving great food and experiences while we handle the operations.

inventoryManagement.title: Inventory Management
inventoryManagement.subtitle: Monitor ingredients in real time, get low-stock alerts, and simplify supplier orders to keep your kitchen running smoothly.

staffManagement.title: Staff Management
staffManagement.subtitle: Create and share staff schedules in minutes, manage shifts, and track attendance — all from one place. Say goodbye to last-minute chaos.

problemSolution.title: We Know the Struggles of Running a Restaurant
problemSolution.subtitle: Managing staff, tracking stock, updating menus, and keeping customers coming back can feel overwhelming. That's why we built a simple, all-in-one tool designed for cafés and restaurants.
problemSolution.leftPanelTitle: How we can help you grow your business

solutions.title: Track inventory easily
solutions.description: Keep your stock up-to-date, get low-stock alerts, and reorder ingredients effortlessly.
solutions.cardDescription: Monitor ingredients in real time, get low-stock alerts, and simplify supplier orders to keep your kitchen running smoothly.

solutions.title: Manage staff schedules
solutions.description: Create and share shifts, track attendance, and communicate easily with your team.
solutions.cardDescription: Create and share staff schedules in minutes, manage shifts, and track attendance — all from one place.

solutions.title: Update menus quickly
solutions.description: Add new items, remove old ones, and update prices without hassle.
solutions.cardDescription: Easily manage your menu and keep your offerings up-to-date for your customers.

solutions.title: Boost customer loyalty
solutions.description: Engage your customers and keep them coming back with personalized offers.
solutions.cardDescription: Build loyalty programs, track customer preferences, and improve retention.

integration.title: Seamless Setup, Zero Hassle
integration.subtitle: No complicated integrations. Just create your account, set up your business details, and start managing everything from one place — right away.

pricing.title: Choose The Plans That Suits You!

faq.subtitle: Got questions? We've got answers. Here are some of the most common questions restaurant and café owners ask about using our platform.
